task_snapshots.title: 508a — Plugin SDK with Documentation
task_snapshots.description:
# 508a — Plugin SDK with Documentation
**Role:** docs **Priority:** 1 **Scope:** medium

Document the existing Pluggy-based plugin system. Publish SDK guide: how to write custom quality gates, routers, notifiers. Add example plugins. No competitor has a documented plugin SDK.
